title: A college instructor turns to typewriters to curb AI usage
body: The scene is right out of the 1950s with students pecking away at manual typewriters, the machines dinging at the end of each

title: Anthropic cracks down on Claude subscribers using OpenClaw, users say it is hurtful
body: Anthropic is cracking down on users who run third-party services such as OpenClaw, an open-source agentic AI platform, on its Claude AI models. Going forward, users will have to pay extra for such third-party services on its AI platforms.

title: Broadcom: The AI Plumber Set For A Massive Explosion
body: AI XPU & Ethernet leadership, 106% AI revenue growth, hyperscaler deals, and cheaper valuation after pullback—read now.

title: Mark Zuckerberg is assembling new AI hardware team, likely to expand beyond AI smart glasses
body: Mark Zuckerberg-led Meta is reportedly doubling down on AI hardware devices. After the success of the Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses, Meta is assembling a new hardware team as part of its Superintelligence Labs (MSL).

title: Trump Is 'Working Nonstop,' White House Claims—As He Keeps Low Profile In D.C. This Weekend
body: Trump has not made a public appearance since Iran shot down a U.S. fighter jet on Friday, which left one crew member missing.
